readings.summary: Elisha promises a son to an influential woman.

readings.citation:
Ps 89:2-3, 16-17, 18-19, R. v.2a
For ever I will sing the goodness of the Lord.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 89:2-3, 16-17, 18-19, R. v.2a
For ever I will sing the goodness of the Lord.

readings.summary: We are baptized into Christ's death.

You are a chosen race, a royal priesthood, a holy nation;
announce the praises of him who called you out of darkness into his wonderful light.

antiphons.text:
All peoples, clap your hands.
Cry to God with shouts of joy!

Bless the Lord, O my soul,
and all within me, his holy name.

O Father, I pray for them, that they may be one in us,
that the world may believe that you have sent me, says the Lord.
